entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "ଅଧିକ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା କରିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ମୋତେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଉତ୍ତର ଦେବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ମୋ ଉତ୍ତର ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Find angles on AI ethics"
entries.value: "AI ନୈତିକତା ଉପରେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିକୋଣ ଖୋଜନ୍ତୁ"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "ମୁଁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିବା ପରେ ଆଉ କଠିନ ଭାର୍ସନ୍ ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Keep ଏହା beginner friendly."

entries.source: "Plan a paper on urbanization"
entries.value: "ସହରୀକରଣ ଉପରେ ଏକ ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ ପାଇଁ ଯୋଜନା କରନ୍ତୁ"

entries.source: "Research renewable energy"
entries.value: "ଅକ୍ଷୟ ଶକ୍ତି ଉପରେ ଗବେଷଣା କରନ୍ତୁ"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "ମୋ ପରୀକ୍ଷା, ପ୍ରକଳ୍ପ କିମ୍ବା ଦୈନିକ ଜୀବନରୁ ଉଦାହରଣ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ।"

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a tiny ପ୍ରଥମ task.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End ସହିତ a recap ଆପଣ ଲେଖନ୍ତୁ yourself.

entries.source: For Research Assistant, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: ପାଇଁ ଗବେଷଣା Assistant, a ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ଲୁପ୍ ହେଉଛି:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ପାଇଁ କାମଟି ସରଳ: Turn a ବିସ୍ତୃତ ବିଷୟ into ଗବେଷଣା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, search ସର୍ତ୍ତ, outlines, ଓ source notes।

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: ଭଲ prompts ସାଧାରଣତଃ ତିନୋଟି କଥା ଧରେ: subject, ଆପଣଙ୍କ current level, ଏବଂ କେମିତି ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ଦରକାର। Perfect wording ଦରକାର ନାହିଁ। Session ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ପାଇଁ ଯଥେଷ୍ଟ context ଦରକାର।

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: If the response feels too ବିସ୍ତୃତ, narrow ଏହା. ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ଉଦାହରଣ, ଏକ ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା, ଏକ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ, କିମ୍ବା ଏକ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ. If ଏହା feels too easy, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a challenge. If ଏହା feels too କଠିନ, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a bridge ରୁ କ’ଣ ଆପଣ already know.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: ଆଉଟପୁଟ୍‌କୁ ଅଧିକ ଉପଯୋଗୀ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Research Assistant on inspir.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Research Assistant ଠାରୁ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫଳ ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଧାରଣା ଓ ପୁନରାବୃତ୍ତିଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍।

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: ପଢ଼ା an AI response ହେଉଛି ନୁହେଁ the same as ଶିକ୍ଷା. ପରେ the ପ୍ରଥମ ଉତ୍ତର, ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the ମୋଡ୍ କୁ ତିଆରି ଆପଣ do something ସହିତ the ଧାରଣା.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପଥ

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request ମତାମତ ଉପରେ the part ସେହି felt uncertain.

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: ଗବେଷଣା Assistant ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଓ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond ପୂର୍ବରୁ asking ପାଇଁ the solution.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: ଏକ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଅନୁରୋଧ ସହ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟକୁ ଏକ ବାକ୍ୟରେ କହନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ skills

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: ସେହି ଶେଷ recap ହେଉଛି important. କେବେ ଆପଣ ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ the ଧାରଣା back, ଆପଣ reveal କ’ଣ ହେଉଛି solid ଓ କ’ଣ ହେଉଛି still borrowed ରୁ the AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for research assistant with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: ସର୍ବୋତ୍ତମ ଶିକ୍ଷା ଅଧିବେଶନଗୁଡିକ ଅନୁକୂଳନଶୀଳ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ହେଉଛି tuned ପାଇଁ ଗବେଷଣା assistant ସହିତ its own ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଉଦାହରଣ, ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷା flow.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Research Assistant is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Research Assistant ଠାରୁ ଶୀଘ୍ର ମୂଲ୍ୟ ପାଇବାର ଉପାୟ ହେଉଛି AI କୁ କେବଳ ବିଷୟ ନୁହେଁ, ଏକ ଶିକ୍ଷା କାମ ଦେବା। ବିଷୟ ଆପଣ କ’ଣରେ ଆଗ୍ରହୀ କହେ। ଶିକ୍ଷା କାମ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ କେଉଁ ପ୍ରକାର ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ଦରକାର କହେ।

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Then add a constraint ସେହି makes the ଅଧିବେଶନ more personal:

entries.source: Thinking
entries.value: ଚିନ୍ତନ

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: ଏହି ଆରମ୍ଭକଗୁଡିକ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଏକଟି ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: ମୋଡ୍‌କୁ ଅଭ୍ୟାସରେ ପରିଣତ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.source: Use Research Assistant when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Project Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: କାମ ପାଇଁ ଏହା ଠିକ୍ ମୋଡ୍ ହେଲେ Research Assistant ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ। ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ ପଥ ଚାହିଁଲେ Project Coach ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ। ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ, ସୋକ୍ରାଟିକ୍ ଶିକ୍ଷା, ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ, ରୋଲପ୍ଲେ ଓ ସକ୍ରିୟ ସ୍ମରଣ ପାଇଁ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ବ୍ଲଗ୍‌କୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ବ୍ରାଉଜ୍ କରିପାରିବେ।
